user.title: Add child
user.description: Add a child to monitor medication doses. Custom medications are optional; enter one per line as: Name, max doses in 24h, max amount in 24h mg, dose size mg.

error.invalid_custom_medications: Enter custom medications as one per line: Name, max doses in 24h, max amount in 24h mg, dose size mg.

init.title: Add another child
init.description: Add another child to this medication tracker. Custom medications are optional; enter one per line as: Name, max doses in 24h, max amount in 24h mg, dose size mg.

error.invalid_custom_medications: Enter custom medications as one per line: Name, max doses in 24h, max amount in 24h mg, dose size mg.
